metadata.titleDefault: Blueseas Marine Consulting (BMC) | Marine Inspection & Technical Consultancy
metadata.description: Blueseas Marine Consulting (BMC) provides marine inspections, technical audits and specialized consultancy for the maritime industry, with worldwide coverage and response.

footer.description: Marine inspection, technical audits and consultancy for the maritime industry, with global coverage and rapid response.
footer.tagline: Worldwide Marine Inspection, Audits and Technical Consultancy.

hero.title: Marine Inspection, Audits and Technical Consultancy Worldwide
hero.subtitle: We support shipowners, operators, insurers and P&I clubs with reliable inspections, rigorous technical audits and rapid response in any port worldwide.

services.title: Technical solutions for every stage of your operation
services.description: From one-off inspections to ongoing audit programs, we tailor every service to the needs of your fleet or operation.

items.title: Marine Inspections
items.description: On-board inspections of vessels and equipment, aligned with international industry standards.

items.title: Technical Audits
items.description: Technical and management audits to verify operational and regulatory compliance.

items.title: Condition Surveys
items.description: Condition and pre-purchase surveys to assess the real state of a vessel.

items.title: Technical Consultancy
items.description: Specialized advisory support for operators, insurers and protection and indemnity clubs.

values.title: The values that guide every inspection
values.description: The same technical rigor and professionalism as the industry's leaders, with our own modern identity.

items.title: Technical Excellence
items.description: Rigorous standards in every inspection and report we deliver.

items.title: Global Coverage
items.description: A network of inspectors ready to respond in the world's major ports.

items.title: Rapid Response
items.description: Agile coordination to minimize wait times and operational delays.

items.title: Trust and Transparency
items.description: Clear, objective reports that support confident commercial decisions.

industries.title: We work alongside the key players in the maritime industry
industries.description: Our services are designed to address the specific needs of every segment of the maritime chain.

coverage.title: A network of inspectors ready to respond wherever you are
coverage.description: We coordinate inspections and audits in the world's major ports, with response times designed not to interrupt your operation.

finalCta.title: Need an inspection or technical audit?
finalCta.description: Tell us what you need and we'll coordinate with our team on the best solution for your operation, wherever you are.

metadata.title: About Us
metadata.description: Meet Blueseas Marine Consulting (BMC): our mission, values and the technical approach we apply to every inspection and audit.

hero.title: Maritime technical expertise with international standards
hero.description: Blueseas Marine Consulting (BMC) was created to provide reliable inspections, audits and technical consultancy to the maritime industry, with the same rigor that defines the sector's leaders.

mission.title: To be the maritime industry's trusted technical partner
mission.description: To deliver highly precise inspections, audits and technical consultancy that let our clients operate safely, compliantly and with confidence anywhere in the world.

vision.title: To be a global reference in marine inspection and consultancy
vision.description: To build a services platform that evolves alongside the industry, embracing technology and digitalization without losing the technical judgment that defines BMC.

valuesHeading.title: What defines us in every job

approach.title: How we work on every inspection
approach.description: A clear, repeatable process designed to give our clients predictability from start to finish.

items.title: We understand your operation
items.description: We assess the context, the type of vessel or asset, and the goal of the inspection or audit before coordinating the work.

items.title: We coordinate in the right place
items.description: We assign qualified inspectors at the required port or location, minimizing operational delays.

items.title: We execute with technical rigor
items.description: We apply international industry standards to every inspection, audit or survey.

items.title: We deliver clear reports
items.description: Precise, actionable documentation designed to support commercial and operational decisions.

cta.title: Want to learn more about how we work?

metadata.title: Services
metadata.description: Marine inspections, technical audits, condition surveys, vetting and technical consultancy for the maritime industry with global coverage.

hero.title: Technical services to operate safely and stay compliant
hero.description: We cover the full range of technical needs of maritime operations, from one-off inspections to ongoing audit programs.

list.title: Marine Inspections
list.description: On-board inspections of vessels, cargo and equipment, ranging from routine inspections to specific client and insurer requirements.

list.title: Technical Audits
list.description: Technical and management audits that assess operational, documentary and regulatory compliance.

list.title: Condition & Pre-Purchase Surveys
list.description: Assessment of a vessel's real condition to support purchase, sale, financing or insurance decisions.

list.title: Vetting Support
list.description: Technical support through vetting processes for operators, charterers and terminals, aligned with industry standards.
points: Follow-up on observations and closing findings

list.title: Technical Consultancy
list.description: Specialized advisory services for shipowners, operators, insurers and P&I clubs on technical and operational matters.
points: Support in claims and technical disputes

list.title: Incident Response
list.description: Coordination of rapid technical inspection following incidents, damage or events that require immediate assessment.

process.title: A simple, end-to-end process
process.description: We coordinate every request with predictability, from first contact to the final report.

items.title: Request
items.description: Tell us what you need and where.

items.title: Assignment
items.description: We coordinate the right inspector for the location and the job.

items.title: Execution
items.description: We carry out the inspection or audit with rigorous technical standards.

items.title: Report
items.description: We deliver a clear report with findings and recommendations.

cta.title: Tell us which service you need and we'll coordinate the inspection

metadata.title: Industries
metadata.description: BMC provides inspection and technical consultancy to shipowners, operators, charterers, insurers, P&I clubs, shipyards and other maritime industry players.

hero.title: A technical service designed for every player in the maritime chain
hero.description: We work with different segments of the industry, tailoring each service to their specific commercial and operational needs.

items.title: Shipowners & Operators
items.description: Inspections and audits that support day-to-day fleet operations, reducing risk and downtime.

items.title: Charterers
items.description: Delivery, redelivery and condition inspections that support commercial chartering decisions.

items.title: P&I Clubs & Insurers
items.description: Independent technical surveys that support risk assessments, claims and disputes.

items.title: Shipyards
items.description: Technical and quality audits during repair, maintenance and construction processes.

items.title: Cargo Interests
items.description: Cargo and stowage inspections to protect the integrity of goods during maritime transport.

items.title: Offshore & Energy
items.description: Technical consultancy and inspection for offshore operations and maritime energy projects.

items.title: Financial & Legal Advisors
items.description: Objective technical reports that support financing processes, due diligence and legal disputes.

cta.title: Don't see your industry on the list? We can still help

metadata.title: Global Coverage
metadata.description: Blueseas Marine Consulting (BMC) inspector network with coverage in the world's major ports and rapid response capability.

hero.title: Worldwide presence, local response
hero.description: We coordinate inspections and technical audits in the world's major ports, with inspectors ready to respond wherever the operation requires.

regions.title: Coverage by region
regions.description: We work with a strategically distributed network of inspectors to respond quickly anywhere in the world.

items.title: Americas
items.description: Coverage in ports across North, Central and South America.

items.title: Europe
items.description: A network of inspectors in major European and Mediterranean ports.

items.title: Africa
items.description: Presence at key points along the African coast.

items.title: Middle East
items.description: Coverage across the region's strategic routes and ports.

items.title: Asia-Pacific
items.description: A network of inspectors across major maritime hubs in Asia and Oceania.

highlights.title: Global coverage with consistent technical judgment
highlights.description: It's not just about being present in more places — it's about maintaining the same level of rigor in every inspection, no matter where it takes place.

items.title: Global Inspector Network
items.description: Qualified professionals available in the world's major ports.

items.title: Agile Coordination
items.description: Rapid inspector assignment to minimize operational delays.

items.title: Consistent Technical Standards
items.description: The same quality and reporting standards, regardless of location.

items.title: Local Team, Global Standard
items.description: Local context knowledge combined with consistent technical processes.

cta.title: Need an inspector at a specific port?

metadata.description: Contact Blueseas Marine Consulting (BMC) to request an inspection, technical audit or maritime consultancy anywhere in the world.
